---
title: "Projects"
toc: false
---

### Structural Intelligence (SI) Framework

A unifying theoretical foundation bridging neuroscience, statistical physics, and AI through structural information principles.

- **Redundancy as structure**: Optimal information redundancy for learning and generalization
- **Spectral coherence**: Model-free metrics for quality assessment of complex structures
- **Timescale physics**: How hidden forcing and timescale coalescence shape observable dynamics
- **Financial connectomics**: Brain-inspired frameworks for modeling latent market dynamics

---

### SpecRNA-QA

Spectral graph features for reference-free RNA 3D structure quality assessment. [GitHub](https://github.com/yudabitrends/specrnaq)

- Model-free spectral features from RNA contact graphs
- Reference-free quality assessment pipeline
- Benchmarked on RNA-Puzzles and CASP-RNA datasets

---

### MultiViT / MultiViT2

Multimodal vision transformer frameworks for brain imaging analysis.

- Integrates structural MRI and functional connectivity data
- Achieves AUC 0.833 for schizophrenia classification (MultiViT)
- Data augmentation via latent diffusion models (MultiViT2)
- Published in *Human Brain Mapping* and *IEEE ISBI*
